description_long: This is a Prestige Delight Lite rice cooker, prominently featuring a cylindrical body with a smooth, light blue exterior adorned with floral patterns. The cooker has a detachable stainless steel lid with a central handle, and a front-facing control panel with a switch and indicator lights. The packaging highlights its starch reducer accessory, which is shown as a separate white bowl with a lid. The cooker is compact, with cool-touch side handles and a sturdy base. The box displays branding, product features, and usage instructions, making it suitable for modern kitchens and urban households.
description: A compact, light blue Prestige rice cooker with floral accents, a stainless steel lid, and a starch reducer accessory, designed for modern kitchens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rice cooker, its stainless steel lid, control panel, and the starch reducer accessory beside it, along with prominent branding and product features.
description_view_1: Rear/side view of the packaging, displaying product features, diagrams, and instructions, with no direct view of the rice cooker itself.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this view shows the rice cooker and starch reducer from the front, emphasizing the product's branding and visual appeal.
description_view_3: Back view of the packaging, featuring a detailed product description and step-by-step usage instructions with illustrative images.
attribute_brand_logo: Prestige logo in red and white, located on the upper left of the front face of the packaging and on the rice cooker body, rectangular in shape and medium in size.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single switch with indicator lights on the front lower section of the rice cooker, labeled for cooking and warming functions, with no display screen.
attribute_lid_design: Removable, circular stainless steel lid with a central plastic handle, no visible vents or windows, fits snugly on top of the cooker.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, side-mounted plastic handles in light blue, integrated into the body for easy lifting.
